raw_consumer_statement: We hired an individual to paint our house in XXXX. We were selling the house. He used our Citi Mastercard. The amount he charged was {$7500.00}. The house was empty, and we had moved XXXX XXXX  away, so the realtor was checking on the house and checking XXXX XXXX work. She had some problems with his work and told him it needed to be re-done because it looked so bad we couldn't put it on the market. He charged our card anyway on XXXX XXXX without correcting the work and refused to come and correct it. We had to hire another company for {$10000.00} to come and redo the job. I opened a dispute with Citi on XX/XX/XXXX. Once I realized I could do that with an individual person after talking with Citi about this. I never heard anything by mail and assumed it was fine and checked to see if I had a credit and I did. I then had a minor dispute to enter with them and saw the dispute center online, which I had never used. I did it this way and saw that my dispute with the painter went in his favor because Citi needed more information from us. I had no idea about this, so I called and explained, the agent said no problem, we will reopen the dispute, and you can provide all your information that way. I did, they received it, I have pictures of the horrible work, a receipt etc. I got a notification today that they can not help us because too much time has passed. I called and asked for a supervisor today XX/XX/year> - XXXX is her name. She said there is nothing they can do ; the decision was made. She ended up hanging up on me when I continued to ask questions. This is a legitimate dispute, we were scammed by this guy, and we want our refund. We can not help the time that passed when we didn't receive the letter because our account is set up as paperless. They did not alert us by calling or emailing us to say that our dispute needed more info. We never knew about the online dispute center. A letter or call to inform us would have kept this from happening. They dropped the ball and should have our back since we are customers that spend money with them daily.
